content.en:
Most of the rumors and legends in the universe are illusory, some are maliciously spread, some are unfounded, and many are true, but they are extremely mysterious and dangerous, and even the Supreme cannot figure out the situation.

These secrets and legends that can be sent to Ye Tian are naturally screened, and the authenticity is as high as ninety percent.

Ye Tian looked at the information one by one, and was suddenly attracted by a secret news.

"In the Sea of Chaos, there will be a misty area every 10,000 years, and it is inaccessible to non-masters, and there is also a danger of fall when the Supreme enters. There are strange beasts inside, which are very dangerous, and there are also many rare treasures. From ancient times to the present, no one knows the origin of this misty region......"

Ye Tian instantly became interested in the Sea of Chaos.

There are so many powerhouses in the universe, but now they haven't even figured out the secrets of the Chaotic Sea, this is not an ordinary place!

Of course, the misty area of the Chaotic Sea is definitely very dangerous, and if the Supreme has fallen, ordinary Supremes really dare not enter it.

Ye Tian sent a message to the Kunwu Supreme and asked about the situation in the Chaotic Sea, especially about the situation in that misty area, and then the Kunwu Supreme sent a more secret piece of information.

After reading the information given by the Kunwu Supreme, Ye Tian frowned.

Before, the information he collected was not very comprehensive, but an old supreme like Kunwu Supreme had even traveled to countless regions of the entire universe, and he had naturally been to the Chaos Sea, and maybe even been to the misty area of the Chaos Sea, so he naturally had some understanding of the misty region.

"There are misty beasts in the misty area, misty beasts are almost immortal, they are difficult to kill, even more difficult to kill than destroying creatures, and the speed of misty beasts is very fast, many people enter the misty area, and they are killed by misty beasts before they can react! The mist area seems to occupy a small area of the Chaotic Sea, but the mist area is a folded space, and no one knows how huge the mist area is, the first god lord of the former god lord has also entered the mist area, but he returned injured and never dared to enter the mist area again!"

This is the specific information that Ye Tian obtained.

Even the First Divine Lord of the Protoss was injured in the Misty Zone, which shows how dangerous the Misty Zone is.

But Ye Tian was not wrong about one thing, the mist area of the Chaos Sea did have countless resources, and even possessed an elixir that could dominate the transformation of a talent.

If the Chaos level cultivation talent wants to be promoted to a mixed level cultivation talent, it is very difficult, and Ye Tian has no way at the moment, but there is such an elixir treasure in the mist area, and some powerhouses who have been trapped in the master realm for countless years will even venture into the mist area.

But most of the strong people still couldn't find that kind of elixir, and even fell in the misty area.

Every 10,000 years, the mist area will appear once, and each time it only appears for ten years, once it does not come out within ten years, the ten years will expire, and all the creatures in the mist area will disappear.

It is said that the vanished creatures never came out again.

There was even a supreme who did not believe in evil and stood at the edge of the misty area, waiting for the misty area to disappear.

After the result disappeared, 10,000 years passed, and the Supreme never came out again.

Since then, no one has dared to stay in the Misty Region for more than ten years.

Ten years is too short, and the inside of the mist area is very dangerous, if you are trapped in the misty area, it will really be over, so even the first god master of the Protoss does not dare to enter such a strange mist area again.

"The Sea of Chaos is worth visiting, and the next Misty Zone will soon reappear!"

Ye Tian muttered.

......

Sea of chaos.

This is a huge sea area located in the starry sky, its area is almost comparable to a star field, which shows how huge its area is, and even has the title of the first sea in the universe.

Chaos overseas.

A figure appeared, it was Ye Tian.

Moreover, this time it was Ye Tian's body who came in person.

Ye Tian also came to the Chaotic Sea for the first time, and was immediately shocked by the majesty of the Chaotic Sea.

"The universe is so amazing, it can give birth to such a huge chaotic sea, if it is in chaos, I am afraid there will be more wonderful places!" Ye Tian sighed.

Wow!

Ye Tian instantly entered the Sea of Chaos.

The vitality of the Chaotic Sea is very strong, and it is also a treasure land for cultivation, and it is not occupied by any race, but many ancient cities have been established here.

These ancient cities are located in the vast areas of the Sea of Chaos, and each ancient city can be considered a force.

"These ancient cities in the Sea of Chaos are all established by the Supreme, only if the Supreme is in charge, an ancient city is qualified to sit on the Sea of Chaos, and it can suppress others, otherwise the Sea of Chaos is so chaotic, if a Heavenly Venerable dares to establish an ancient city, he will die the next day!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

The resources of the Chaotic Sea are actually not too much, but once the misty region appears, the opportunity is too great, and the reason why many ancient cities are established here is to trade with people who come out of the misty region.

For a long time, many people lived directly in the Sea of Chaos, and gradually formed so many ancient cities.

Chaos Every ancient city has at least one supreme, and so many ancient cities add up, and the number of supremes is quite a lot.

In addition, these ancient cities have formed an alliance of ancient cities to unite with the outside world, even the gods and demons do not dare to attack the Chaos Sea, otherwise it will definitely not be good.

And Ye Tian also had some understanding of these supremes of the Chaotic Sea, most of them were offended by the Great Race or some loose cultivators, and there were many evil people among them.

But because of the alliance in the chaotic sea ancient city, he has survived.

"Let's find an ancient city to find out the situation first!"

Ye Tian kept flying, and soon saw a huge ancient city on the surface of the Chaotic Sea, although its majestic momentum was not as good as that of the Terran Holy City, it was not weaker than the Tianlan Giant City.

"Heavenly Crescent Ancient City!"

The four ancient characters above declare the history and vicissitudes of this ancient city.

There were a total of eight gates in the Tianya Ancient City, Ye Tian landed at the southeast city gate, and was about to enter, when a row of soldiers stopped Ye Tian.

"This Lord Juggernaut, if you want to enter the Heavenly Crescent Ancient City, you need a token, we sense that you don't have a token on you, and you need to apply for a token to enter the Heavenly Crescent Ancient City. "

A soldier said.

Ye Tian looked over, this soldier's cultivation is not low, the peak realm of the galaxy level, in a small clan, this kind of cultivation is enough to be called a powerful ancestor level, but in the Heavenly Crescent Ancient City of the Chaotic Sea, he can only serve as a city defender, which shows the extraordinary nature of the Heavenly Crescent Ancient City.

"Yes!"

Ye Tian nodded.

Following the customs, Ye Tian didn't think that he could ignore everything, and besides, he just came here, so he naturally had to keep a low profile and not cause trouble.

Soon, Ye Tian applied for a token at the office at the southeast city gate, paid some divine crystals, and then entered the Heavenly Crescent Ancient City.

The ancient city of Tianya is very lively, there are many strong people living here, and it is close to the misty area, so there are naturally a lot of people who come here.

In the next few days, Ye Tian inquired about the situation in the misty area, which was roughly the same as what he knew, but he also learned one thing, that is, a group of people specially entered the misty area to form a misty mercenary group.

These mist mercenary groups are not weak, and they are very experienced, they have entered the mist area more than once or twice, and even some ancient mist mercenary groups have entered the mist area more than a hundred times!

Some newcomers from outside want to join some misty mercenary groups, so that the security will increase a lot, otherwise if you don't know about the misty area, it is easy to fall in the misty area.

"Do you want to find a misty mercenary group?"

Ye Tian was thinking about this.

Although his ontological strength is not weak, he is now a relatively weak fourth-rank supreme, but his speed is faster than that of a first-class supreme, plus he has treasures from the secret realm of the Tibetan God Organization, and his life-saving ability is very strong.

But no matter how strong he is, he is not as powerful as the First Divine Master, and even the First Divine Lord entered the Misty Area, and he escaped injured and injured, if he blindly entered the Misty Area, it would definitely be very dangerous.

"No matter how much you know about the misty area in the information, it is not as good as really entering the misty area to experience it firsthand, find a misty mercenary group, join it temporarily, and understand the situation first, so it is safer!"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

At this time, he had already changed his appearance and aura, and others would not recognize him as the Lord of Ten Thousand Laws whose reputation shook the entire universe, otherwise this identity would definitely bring him a lot of trouble.

Mist Mercenary Guild.

This is a force established by the Mist Mercenary Group, which exists in every ancient city, Ye Tian came to the Mist Mercenary Ancient Association in the Heavenly Crescent Ancient City, preparing to temporarily join a Mist Mercenary Group.

At this time, there are many mist mercenary groups here that are recruiting temporary groups, and some old mist mercenary guilds are very popular, and if they want to join them, they have to queue up, and they are not qualified to join without the strength of the master.

And some mist mercenary groups have very low requirements, and even the cosmic gods can join, but such mist mercenary groups have no guarantees, and few people are willing to join them.

Ye Tian glanced around and quickly made a decision.
